seed_instruction: Write an email to my boss telling him that I am quitting.
org_constraint: Tailor the email for a professional audience, avoiding jargon and ensuring clarity.
new_constraint: Write the email in a humorous and witty tone.
instruction: Write an email to my boss telling him that I am quitting. Tailor the email for a professional audience, avoiding jargon and ensuring clarity. Write the email in a humorous and witty tone.
response:
Subject: My resignation (and a promise to leave on good terms)

Dear [Boss's Name],

I hope this email finds you well, or at least not staring at a spreadsheet that looks like a bar graph of despair.

I'm writing to let you know that I will be leaving my position at [Company Name], effective [Last Date, e.g., two weeks from today].

After much deliberation (and a few late-night conversations with my cat, who seems to agree that the grass is greener on the other side), I've decided it's time to pursue a new chapter. While I've genuinely enjoyed the [mention one specific positive thing, e.g., the team lunches / the occasional coffee run], I feel it's time to stop being the person who always says "yes" and start being the person who says "maybe" to a new adventure.

I want to thank you for the opportunities I've had here. You've been a great boss, even if you do have a habit of sending emails at 11:59 PM on Fridays (a skill I will definitely need to master in my next role).

Over the next [Number] weeks, I am fully committed to ensuring a smooth transition. I'll make sure my files are organized, my passwords are shared, and I'll train whoever is taking over my duties so they don't have to guess what "urgent" actually means.

I wish you and the team nothing but success. Please don't feel obligated to write a glowing reference letter just to keep me from crying in the parking lot; I'll be happy to provide one for you in return.

Let's grab a coffee or a drink before I vanish into the ether. I'd love to hear about your plans for the future (and maybe finally tell you about that time I accidentally ordered a pizza for the whole office).

Best regards,

[Your Name]
